textByHash.04587705b17974a11adb4c09a5df1375ab64fdcf: So I see! Unfortunately, it seems to have expired yesterday! Nevermind.
textByHash.2eec85416985c50947bdf3a9c22169c048847410: I'm sorry, there's nothing I can do.
textByHash.37712995f5b2a195c5339c190eb8d29c67a3a004: Oh, I am quite confident in the quality of my work...as will you be if you take a look at my wares.
textByHash.3e9399495bfaebe24149c4e8fe817c021273519e: One man even threatened me with a hammer, saying that when he set up his smithy, my shoddy workmanship would be revealed!
textByHash.66952d5eef58677a71a78b55b676acc4340747e9: Seriously, you'll be a monkey's uncle before you'll ever hold a dragon scimitar.
textByHash.a27587883a7d52ee87ab81307e9955906a18dc2a: A dragon scimitar? A DRAGON scimitar?
textByHash.a83329e5cf7b5049ed7b746105b63fd4938da310: Yes, certainly. I deal in scimitars.
textByHash.bc211aa860e0e9611f8bef18064d3701159659fa: Perhaps you'd like to take a look at my stock?
textByHash.d5f87462279168f0a5506600e83d87a16ec96408: Can't say as I've seen him... I'm sure if he's been to Al Kharid recently someone around here will have though.
textByHash.ef8f1918095cd67df029c493945348177b18fc4c: The banana-brained nitwits who make them would never dream of selling any to me.
textByHash.fed33ce362551f7b1a9f06945886a1fc86830561: Although he does not appear to be dangerous, he has brought several men to this town who have threatened me and several others.
